privileged_info_summary: The sleep_pattern_optimizer@1 task is a medium-difficulty LibreOffice Calc spreadsheet analysis task with a 300-second timeout and ~50 max steps. The task includes synthetic messy sleep tracking data with 21 rows and 8 columns (Date, Bedtime, Wake Time, Quality Score, Caffeine After 2PM, Screen Time hours, Exercise, Notes). Critical data properties: Quality scores range from 4-9 (NOT 1-10 as claimed in README), bedtime has 18 distinct formats mixing 12-hour and 24-hour notation with inconsistent capitalization (11:30 PM vs 23:30 vs 11:45 p.m.), wake time has 17 distinct formats, caffeine and exercise columns have inconsistent capitalization (Yes/No/YES/yes/no), and screen time ranges 0.5-5.5 hours. Verification requires 4+ of 6 criteria met at 70% threshold: sleep duration time arithmetic formula, quality categorization IF formula, conditional formatting, AVERAGEIF correlation formulas, optimal bedtime analysis, and 10+ total formulas for complexity. Data is fully synthetic, generated programmatically in the setup script.
